title: better pvp sound pack
description: better pvp sounds make all hit sounds more clearer better and more satisfying
body:
Better PvP Sounds completely overhauls your in-game audio to give you a massive competitive edge and a much more responsive combat experience. Say goodbye to muffled, generic game audio and enjoy crisp, high-fidelity sound design tailored for high-tier PvP.
### Key Features
• Crystal-Clear Hits: Distinct, punchy hit sounds that make tracking your damage output effortless.
• Satisfying Audio Cues: Optimized sounds for critical hits, bow shots, and shield blocks so you instantly know what's happening mid-fight.
• Reduced Audio Clutter: Lowers unnecessary background frequencies so you can focus entirely on your opponent's footwork and spacing.
• Maximum Responsiveness: Clean audio transients that feel instantly satisfying, making your gameplay feel faster and more locked-in.
### Showcase
